heading: Enterprise People Analytics Platform Backend
desc: Built and maintained backend services for an enterprise people analytics platform, supporting survey management, participant workflows, analytics processing, AI-driven insights, and secure organization-level data access.

heading: AI Insights and Cogni Assistant Backend
desc: Developed AI-powered analytics and assistant features that generate insights, support conversational workflows, and help users explore organizational network data.

heading: Passive ONA Data Pipeline
desc: Built data pipelines for organizational network analysis, transforming communication and collaboration data into actionable workforce insights.

heading: Survey Automation and Response Processing API
desc: Developed backend workflows for creating, distributing, and tracking organizational surveys, including participant management, response processing, and reporting.

heading: DAO and ONA Initiative
desc: Planned and architected a 12-month DAO initiative for the Network-First Manifesto, including governance platform strategy, legal/compliance documentation, treasury workflows, founder training plans, and a DAO-focused ONA methodology for commercial services.

heading: Blockchain Creator
desc: Built a blockchain prototype featuring proof-of-work consensus, node communication, transaction validation, and block generation.

heading: MongoDB Post Storage System/REST API
desc: Built a scalable blog management platform with REST APIs for creating, storing, and managing content.
